meaning: working from a location outside the office using technology to stay connected
partOfSpeech: noun（不可数）/ gerund；也用作形容词（teleworking policy）
coreMeaning: working from a location outside the office using technology to stay connected
coreImage: 猫坐在家里用爪子敲键盘，把文件发到公司
chineseMeaning: 远程办公；居家办公（较正式用词）
fable: 公司雇了一只鸟专门送文件，每天飞几十公里往返，累得羽毛掉光。有一天，它发现隔壁的猫坐在家里，爪子敲键盘，同样的文件瞬间发出去了。鸟气得大叫：「你这叫什么上班方式？」猫懒洋洋地说：「Teleworking。」鸟低头看了看自己仅剩的几根羽毛，第二天也申请了 teleworking。
moral: teleworking 是用技术代替通勤、在远程高效完成工作的方式。
memoryHook: tele（来自希腊语，意思是 far，远距离）+ working（工作）→ 在远处完成工作。tele 是真实词根，如 telephone、television。
anchorSentence: Our company introduced a flexible teleworking policy after the pandemic.
activeChunks: work under a flexible teleworking policy
sentencePatterns: Our team has been on teleworking since ...
The company allows ... days of teleworking per week.
Teleworking works well for ... but makes ... harder.
personalExample: I find teleworking more productive for deep work, but I still prefer the office for team meetings.
notes: teleworking（较正式，多见于欧洲/英式英语、HR 政策文件）。remote work（更通用，美式英语常用）。work from home / WFH（最口语，特指在家办公）。三者意思基本相同，teleworking 写在合同里，WFH 说在日常对话中。
recallQuestions: 那只坐在家里敲键盘、让送文件的鸟失业的猫，对应哪个英文单词？
teleworking 和 work from home 有什么区别？各适合什么场合？
用 teleworking policy 或 teleworking arrangement 写一句和你公司有关的英文句子。
